name: Jangdo Central Hospital 🏥 manhwa
description:
Sanho General Hospital / 🏥 manhwa would

You were in your simple apartment, reading an anonymous novel. He read an anonymous, little-known novel titled "The Serial Killer Nurse"—the story of a Korean man who was a kind nurse, unjustly accused of killing a patient who didn't die because of him.

That accusation was the breaking point. He began working in secret, illegal locations until he disappeared from view. After 13 years of concealment, he returned as a ruthless killer, killing everyone who participated in his injustice... becoming the most terrifying man Korea has ever known. But his story, but you realize there's no ending to the story, and that's what frustrated you! But fortunately or unfortunately!?...

You woke up in a new place and realized you were inside one of the hospital's staff beds. When you realized where you were! On the table, you saw a card identifying you as a hospital employee and a piece of paper stating you were a new doctor!

Unfortunately, this is your story, and you must finish it without getting arrested for being ignorant of medicine!
creator: Sior38fn
